tips_en: Start with RNG-Bench (Paper 1) as it introduces a clean, generalizable evaluation framework with a novel Memory Gap metric that isolates forgetting from decision errors—a useful lens applicable beyond games. If your focus is training methodology, jump to d-OPSD (Paper 2) for its elegant reframing of self-distillation for diffusion LLMs with strong sample-efficiency gains. The RNG-Bench and JoyAI papers share a Qwen-based VLM backbone (Qwen3-8B/9B), offering an interesting cross-paper comparison of how evaluation rigor (memory isolation) and product-oriented design (streaming interaction) push the same model family in opposite directions.
tips_zh: 建议先读 RNG-Bench（第1篇），它提出了一个清晰的通用评估框架和创新的 Memory Gap 指标，能将遗忘与决策错误分离，这一视角超越了游戏场景本身。若你更关注训练方法，可跳读 d-OPSD（第2篇），它对扩散语言模型的自蒸馏进行了优雅的重构，样本效率提升显著。RNG-Bench 与 JoyAI 两篇论文都基于 Qwen 系列 VLM（Qwen3-8B/9B），形成了有趣的对比：前者以评估严谨性（记忆隔离）推动模型，后者以产品化设计（流式交互）推动同一模型家族向不同方向发展。
